name: Far East Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tofu or tempeh, steamed for 10 minutes and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or skillet with 1 tbsp oil over medium heat.
2. Add the tofu or tempeh and stir-fry until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in sesame seeds and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add onions, celery, and spinach leaves to the pan. Cook for a few minutes until vegetables are tender.
5. If using eggs, crack one into the center of the pan and scramble gently until just set.
6. Add the cooked brown rice and tamari sauce, stirring to combine all ingredients evenly.
7. Sprinkle chopped green onions on top before serving.
Food exchanges per serving: 4 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 STARCH/BREADS EXCHANGES + 2 FATS EXCHANGES; PRO: 14gm; FAT: 13gm; CAR: 36gm.
